ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_hotttnesss" REAL /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the artist's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the artist's location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the artist */,
  "genres" TEXT /* List of genres associated with the artist */,
  "familiarity" REAL /* Familiarity score of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Link to the artist's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Reference to the artist performing the song */,
  "release_id" TEXT /* Reference to the release the song belongs to */,
  "song_hotttnesss" REAL /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness level of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song in BPM */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the song */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the song */,
  "time_signature" TEXT /* Time signature of the song */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the song contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "release_name" TEXT /* Name of the album or release */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Type of release */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* Link to the cover art of the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_genres" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Reference to the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre associated with the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "genre")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* Reference to the song in the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* Reference to the song */,
  "spectral_features" TEXT /* Spectral features of the song */,
  "rhythmic_features" TEXT /* Rhythmic features of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, listener, artist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs_tags" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* Reference to the song */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Associated tags for the song */,
  "terms_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the associated tags */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "terms")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs_fade" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* Reference to the song */,
  "start_of_fade_out" REAL /* Start time of fade out in seconds */,
  "end_of_fade_in" REAL /* End time of fade in in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs_confidence" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* Reference to the song */,
  "key_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level for the key of the song */,
  "mode_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level for the mode of the song */,
  "tatums_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level for tatums in the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)
column_names: List of genres associated with the artist
Link to the artist's profile picture
Reference to the artist performing the song
Reference to the release the song belongs to
Duration of the song in seconds
Tempo of the song in BPM
Flag indicating whether the song contains explicit content

Link to the cover art of the release
Reference to the user who created the playlist

Role of the user (e.g., admin, listener, artist)
